creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 250297
v1

Moin moin!

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update Qt6 and related ports (PySide6 and PyQt6) to 6.7.0.

The compressed patch is attached and can also be found in uncompressed form here: https://people.freebsd.org/~jhale/patches/0001-Qt6-Update-to-6.7.0.patch
